message:
fix: resolve ESLint set-state-in-effect errors in React hooks

Defer setState calls using requestAnimationFrame to comply with
React's recommendation against synchronous setState in effect bodies.

- animated-counter: move reduced-motion setState into rAF callback
- useLocalStorage: wrap localStorage read in rAF to defer setState

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
